Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this training, Teresa is going to walk you step by step through the final preparation checklist you need to have before the event starts. This most likely
will happen 1‐2 days before day one and also the morning before the first session starts. These are things you will want to make sure are in place and
prepared when it is show time!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Test audio, video, mics, projector, markers, etc.
Make sure all attendee items are set out at seats.
Make sure snacks and coffee are ready for attendees.
Finalize agenda, slides and final room walk with the team.
